Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Henry Quan

Defendant Shanida Scott is present.
Attorney Supriya Molina Wunsh representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Divelbiss, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.
